title: Genetic splicer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Genetic splicers''' were devices used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Shaper caste|Shapers]] to access [[qahsa]]s and could also splice [[Gene/Legends|genes]], as the name indicates.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
